name: Vintage Plastic Easter Basket Dark Blue - Spritz™
description:
Add a touch of charm to your Easter celebrations with this Vintage Plastic Easter Basket Dark Blue - Spritz™. Crafted from durable polyethylene, this round basket in a rich dark blue hue is perfect for holding treats or decorative items. Measuring 12 inches in both width and depth, with a height of 6.5 inches, it offers ample space for your holiday essentials while adding a delightful pop of color to your decor.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
